notes: 1P merchant loyalty admin on top of Ratio Core Loyalty Service (in QA; Loyalty APIs draft — all Core calls behind one guarded client with pending_api degradation). Build scope: source-PRD Phase 1 + Phase 2 (bulk CSV credit/debit, CUSTOMER_LIST + SEGMENT earning rules, QR offline events with backend-hosted public landing page, filtered export, customer search + leaderboard, analytics dashboard). App owns rule definitions/evaluation and answers Core's points-earning hook. GATE-0 decisions: name 'Loyalty' (not Wellversed), QR landing backend-hosted (hasStorefrontSdk false), Phase 1+2 scope.
